security.csp: default-src 'self' vscode-file: vscode-webview: asset:; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: vscode-file: vscode-webview:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' vscode-webview:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'none'; object-src 'none'
